creator: mj@bsdops.com
text:
For build and run is required ruby19 but now in pkgng repository package of puppet27 fetching ruby2.0 that makes error in puppet like : 

http://leafac.com/bugs/2013/05/02/problems-with-puppet-in-ruby-2-0.html

In addition on freeshPorts is info abut ruby19 for run and build puppet27.
